dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: I used to feel shy when I met new people, but I learned that a smile can change everything right away.
dialogue.chinese: 我以前见到陌生人时会害羞，但我现在明白，一个微笑就能立刻改变一切。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: A smile costs nothing, yet it tells someone, "You are welcome here," and opens a door.
dialogue.chinese: 微笑不花一分钱，却能告诉别人“这里欢迎你”，也能打开交流的大门。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Then I say a simple hello, just one word, and it feels like a warm, bright invitation.
dialogue.chinese: 然后我说一句简单的“你好”，只有一个词，却像一份温暖而明亮的邀请。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: After that, I ask a sincere question, like, "What do you like to do for fun?"
dialogue.chinese: 之后，我会真诚地问一个问题，比如“你平时喜欢做什么？”

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: That question shows I truly care and want to know more about that person.
dialogue.chinese: 这个问题表明我真的在乎，并且想更多地了解那个人。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: I try this at school, in the library, or even at the playground after class.
dialogue.chinese: 我会在学校、图书馆，甚至下课后的操场上这样和别人打招呼。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: One day I saw a boy sitting alone, quietly reading a comic, and I smiled at him.
dialogue.chinese: 有一天，我看到一个男孩独自坐着，安静地看漫画，于是我对他笑了笑。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: He looked up. I said hello and asked, "What is your favorite comic right now?"
dialogue.chinese: 他抬起头，我说了声“你好”，然后问他现在最喜欢哪本漫画。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: His face lit up, he smiled back, and we started talking about heroes and adventures.
dialogue.chinese: 他的脸上露出光彩，笑着回应，我们于是聊起了英雄和冒险的故事。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Soon we were sharing snacks, laughing at jokes, and making plans to play together.
dialogue.chinese: 很快我们就一起分享零食，笑谈笑话，还计划一起玩耍。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Having a new friend helps me feel less lonely, more cheerful, and more confident each day.
dialogue.chinese: 拥有一位新朋友，让我每天都不再那么孤单，心情更开朗，也更有信心。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Sometimes it is hard, and people may not answer, but I keep trying.
dialogue.chinese: 有时候会遇到困难，别人可能不回应，但我会继续尝试。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: I start with one smile, one hello, one kind question, and I see the world grow friendlier.
dialogue.chinese: 我从一个微笑、一句你好、一个友善的问题开始，看到世界变得更有爱。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Remember, every smile you give can become the first step toward a wonderful friendship.
dialogue.chinese: 记住，你送出的每一个微笑，都可能成为一段美好友谊的第一步。
